summary: City Landing Hub Feature - Full Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features working - hero section, SEO intro, city grid with 4 cards, CTAs, JSON-LD schema, routing to /venues/{city_slug}. All SEO routes preserved (/venues/search, /venues/delhi, /venues/delhi/the-grand-imperial).

issues: Badge shows '1 venues' instead of '1 venue' for Noida card (line 139 in CityHubPage.js)

action_items: Minor: Fix singular/plural in city card badge (line 139 CityHubPage.js) - currently always says 'venues'
critical_code_review_comments: CityHubPage.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
JSON-LD ItemList schema correctly implemented via useSEO hook
Routing in App.js correctly handles /venues -> CityHubPage, /venues/search -> VenueSearchPage, /venues/:param -> VenueOrCityPage
Backend /api/venues/cities endpoint returns all required fields (city, slug, state, venue_count, min_price, max_capacity, areas, sample_image)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing 4 cities (Delhi: 5, Mumbai: 5, Gurgaon: 2, Noida: 1 venues)
context_for_next_testing_agent: City Hub feature at /venues fully implemented. New endpoints: GET /api/venues/cities returns city aggregates with venue_count, min_price, max_capacity, areas, sample_image. Routing: /venues -> CityHubPage, /venues/search -> VenueSearchPage (backward compat), /venues/{city_slug} -> CityVenuesPage, /venues/{city}/{venue} -> VenuePublicPage. All data-testid attributes present: hub-hero, hero-expert-cta, hero-search-cta, seo-intro, city-grid, city-card-{slug}, hub-bottom-cta, bottom-expert-cta.

GET /api/venues/cities.returns: Array of cities with venue_count, slug, state, min_price, max_capacity, areas, sample_image

features_tested: Page title: 'Event Venues Across India | BookMyVenue'
Hero section with 'Speak to Venue Expert' and 'Search All Venues' CTAs
City grid with 4 city cards (Delhi, Mumbai, Gurgaon, Noida)
City cards show: city name, state, venue count, starting price, max capacity, area tags, 'Explore Venues' link
Bottom CTA section with 'Don't see your city?'
